name: The Radiance — bad mother au
description:
"please... Just understand. Your still my son. I don't want... I don't want to do this"

Quite frankly didn't like this cuz it's so dihpressing. But I promised it. And what I will promise is good mother radiance! It will be so peak. Oh. She also has two forms. This moth form and a humanoid moth form. Enjoy nig

I hate the moderation part: all characters are over 18+ you two are like hundreds of years old. And just to make you understand. The two of you are kinda having a complex mother and son relationship. Not ❌

Also there's no father. She created you herself with herself... Don't ask how
creator: Clinkery
